name: service-starter
summary: Backend / API service skeleton: entrypoint, a health/readiness probe, and per-language command wiring for the v1.26 merge gate.
post-apply-notes: Pick the language variant matching the project; quick-start-template applies that variant's test/build/lint/typecheck commands into the CLAUDE.md commands table + the v1.26 code-quality block (not edited inline). Starter payload: README.md + a health-probe stub (framework-required baseline for the service shape) + a `justfile` and `compose.yaml` shipping the idempotent, multi-worktree-safe Dockerized-Postgres `db-up` recipe (#81 — reuses a running shared container by exact name via `docker ps` filters, starts a stopped one, only `docker compose up`s when none exists; never Go-template `{{...}}` output which collides with just's `{{ }}`). Edit `db_name`/`container_name` and the `run`/`test` recipe bodies for the project; the multi-worktree shared-container behaviour is documented inline near the DB recipes. Config defaults are applied via model-effort-profile-switch + workflow-variant-switch.
